positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for yelp_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u29,axiom,
    rating_above_four(hamden_plaza)).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    listed(hamden_plaza)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~many_negative_reviews(X0) | ~listed(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    many_negative_reviews(sK0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~rating_above_four(X0) | listed(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~popular(X0) | rating_above_four(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~takeout(sK0)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    takeout(hamden_plaza)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~listed(sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:

cnf(u29,axiom,
    rating_above_four(hamden_plaza)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~popular(X0) | rating_above_four(X0)).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    listed(hamden_plaza)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~many_negative_reviews(X0) | ~listed(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    many_negative_reviews(sK0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~rating_above_four(X0) | listed(X0)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~listed(sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.

for all inputs,
    define takeout(X0) := $false
